name: Ma Po Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon green onion, white part only, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the pork, soy sauce, rice wine, garlic, ginger, and green onions. Mix well. Refrigerate and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Heat a wok over high heat. Add about 2 tablespoons of oil when hot. When the oil is smoking, add the pork and stir quickly until no longer pink. Add the hot bean paste and crushed chili peppers. Stir.
3. Add the chicken broth and tofu to the wok. Bring to a boil. Then add the peas and mushrooms.
4. Mix the cornstarch with water in another small bowl. Add this mixture to the wok and stir gently until thickened.
5. Drizzle with sesame oil and serve.
